component.name: FeedFlow
component.summary: An open source, minimal RSS reader for your desktop

description.p: FeedFlow is an open source RSS reader built for desktop — a fast, minimal timeline for your news, blogs, and feeds. No algorithms, no clutter, no noise.
A Desktop-First Reading Experience

ul.li: Three-pane layout: sidebar, feed list, and article view — all visible at once
Switch to single-pane mode if you prefer a focused view
Keyboard shortcuts for everything — refresh with F5, navigate with arrow keys, mark as read with Ctrl+Shift+A
The app remembers your window position and size between sessions
Dark mode, light mode, and OLED black theme

description.p: Read Articles Your Way

ul.li: Open articles in your default browser, or use Reader Mode for a distraction-free reading experience
Adjust text size and spacing in Reader Mode for comfortable reading on any screen
Prefetch and cache full article content for offline reading

description.p: Sync Feeds Across All Your Devices

ul.li: Keep everything local, or sync with multiple backends
Self-hosted and server sync with FreshRSS, Miniflux, Feedbin, or BazQux
Your feeds, read status, and bookmarks stay in sync across Linux, Windows, Android, iOS, and macOS

description.p: Stay Organized

ul.li: Import and export feeds with OPML — migrate from any RSS tool
Block keywords to filter out unwanted content
Organize feeds into categories and bookmark articles for later
Search across all your feeds to find articles quickly

description.p: Built for RSS, Atom, and the Open Web

ul.li: Supports RSS 2.0, RSS 1.0, and Atom feed formats
Add feeds by URL or browse curated suggestions
No account required to get started

description.p: Open source with an active community. Available on all major platforms. Translated into 25+ languages.

screenshot.caption: Browse, select, and read in a fast three-pane layout
Read long articles in a clean distraction-free Reader Mode
Choose local-only storage or sync with services that fit your workflow
Adjust layout, density, and what details stay visible

description.p: Fixed a crash in the adaptive layout toolbar
Search state now resets correctly when exiting search
Bug fixing and improvements
Refreshed reader mode with new floating toolbar and navigation bar
Move to the next feed source with one click
Delete all feeds in a category directly from the app
Customize the feed list: hide unread dot, hide feed source, limit description lines
Cleaner settings screen and refined scroll bars
URL tooltip when hovering links
Brand new app icon
Better handling of invalid OPML and CSV imports
Various stability and reliability improvements
Added a new three-pane desktop layout and a switch for users who prefer the single-pane view.
Added a dedicated Settings window with sections for reading, feed list, accounts, sync storage, and about.
Moved accounts, add feed, edit feed, import and export, and blocked words into separate desktop windows.
Improved the docked sidebar with clearer icons, better contrast, stronger selection states, and refreshed colors.
Improved Reader Mode with a new engine, cleaner navigation buttons, better spacing, and a clearer split between list and article panes.
Improved desktop context menus and scrollbars.
Expanded Feed Suggestions with a new Marketing category and more curated sources.
Fixed Reader Mode so fast article switches no longer show stale content.
Added a new three-pane desktop layout and a switch for users who prefer the single-pane view.
Added a dedicated Settings window with sections for reading, feed list, accounts, sync storage, and about.
Moved accounts, add feed, edit feed, import and export, and blocked words into separate desktop windows.
Improved the docked sidebar with clearer icons, better contrast, stronger selection states, and refreshed colors.
Improved Reader Mode with a new engine, cleaner navigation buttons, better spacing, and a clearer split between list and article panes.
Improved desktop context menus and scrollbars.
Expanded Feed Suggestions with a new Marketing category and more curated sources.
Fixed Reader Mode so fast article switches no longer show stale content.
Fixed text scaling on HDPI screens
Added Open Feed Website actions from feed lists for faster source access.
Added auto-hide for articles marked as read and an option to hide feed loading errors.
Improved reader mode rendering with some characters
Fixed some bugs and possible crashes
Improved reader mode readability with better content width and spacing on large screens.
Added Miniflux, Feedbin, and Bazqux sync integrations
OLED theme option for true black backgrounds
Mark all above/below as read feature
Search filter chips for Timeline, Read, and Bookmarks
Drag and drop to change feed categories
Desktop splash screen
Platform-appropriate keyboard shortcuts (F5 refresh, Ctrl+Shift+A mark all read)
Improved reader mode rendering
Better favicon retrieval
Fixed various crashes and stability issues.
Added offline reading - articles can be automatically saved during sync
Navigate between articles directly in reader mode
Added cache management options to clear article content and images
Improved reader mode layout and navigation
Streamlined navigation drawer interface
Fixed date parsing issues with some RSS feeds
Improved error handling when articles fail to load
Bug fixes and performance improvements
Added ability to open article comments directly from Reader Mode
Prevents torrent files from opening in Reader Mode
"Delete week-old posts" now respects current filter (Timeline, Category, Source)
RSS items without links now use enclosure URLs (improves podcast feed support)
Added confirmations for "mark all as read" and "delete week-old feeds" actions
Fix some bugs on date handling
Bug fixing and improvements
Added the possibility to hide articles containing specific keywords/phrases
Added quick-access button in sidebar to navigate to original feed websites
Fixed a bug that prevented automatic favicon fetching
Added visual warnings in the drawer and feed list for feeds that fail to fetch content
Added possibility to delete feed sources directly from edit screen
Added "Navigate to Feed Settings" option in article context menus
Added error codes for better troubleshooting
The app now remembers window position and size between sessions
Added tooltips to all reader mode controls
Improved the dark/light mode detection
Improved window theming
Bug fixing and improvements
Fix an issue where settings weren't saved on Linux
Now the text is selectable on reader mode
Bug fixing and improvements
The identifier of the feed items changed. NOTE: There could be some duplicate items until all the feeds are updated
Avoid triggering a refresh after mark all as read
Add theme switcher
Improve OPML importing
Bug fixes and improvements
Fix issue with Fresh RSS login
First release!
